questions.prompt: Какой вариант правильный для косвенного вопроса: 'He asked where did she live.'?

choices.text: He asked where she lived.
He asked where does she live.
He asked where she lives.
He asked where she live.

questions.explanation: В косвенных вопросах не используется инверсия, порядок слов соответствует утверждению.

questions.prompt: Выберите правильный вариант: 'She asked if he is late.'

choices.text: She asked if he was late.
She asked if he is late.
She asked if he were late.
She asked if he had been late.

questions.explanation: При косвенном вопросе время сдвигается с Present Simple в Past Simple.

questions.prompt: Какой вариант правильный: 'They asked whether I have finished the report.'?

choices.text: They asked whether I had finished the report.
They asked whether I have finished the report.
They asked whether I finished the report.
They asked whether I will finish the report.

questions.explanation: При косвенном вопросе Past Simple сдвигается в Past Perfect.

questions.prompt: Выберите правильный вариант: 'He asked how did you get here.'

choices.text: He asked how you got here.
He asked how do you get here.
He asked how you get here.
He asked how you are getting here.

questions.explanation: В косвенных вопросах отсутствует инверсия, порядок слов соответствует утверждению.

questions.prompt: Какой вариант правильный: 'She asked if did he arrive on time.'?

choices.text: She asked if he had arrived on time.
She asked if he did arrive on time.
She asked if he arrives on time.
She asked if he arrived on time.

questions.explanation: После 'if' порядок слов должен быть как в утверждении, и время сдвигается в Past Perfect.

questions.prompt: Выберите правильный вариант: 'They asked where does the train depart.'?

choices.text: They asked where the train departed.
They asked where does the train depart.
They asked where the train departs.
They asked where the train depart.

questions.explanation: В косвенных вопросах отсутствует инверсия, порядок слов соответствует утверждению.

questions.prompt: Какой вариант правильный: 'He asked whether I am ready.'?

choices.text: He asked whether I was ready.
He asked whether I am ready.
He asked whether I was ready now.
He asked whether I had been ready.

questions.explanation: При косвенном вопросе время сдвигается с Present Simple в Past Simple.

questions.prompt: Выберите правильный вариант: 'She asked if he has finished the project.'?

choices.text: She asked if he had finished the project.
She asked if he has finished the project.
She asked if he finished the project.
She asked if he will finish the project.

questions.explanation: При косвенном вопросе Past Simple сдвигается в Past Perfect.

questions.prompt: Какой вариант правильный: 'They asked if was she late for the meeting.'?

choices.text: They asked if she was late for the meeting.
They asked if was she late for the meeting.
They asked if she is late for the meeting.
They asked if she were late for the meeting.

questions.explanation: После 'if' порядок слов должен быть как в утверждении, без инверсии.

questions.prompt: Выберите правильный вариант: 'He asked when did the meeting start.'?

choices.text: He asked when the meeting started.
He asked when did the meeting start.
He asked when the meeting starts.
He asked when the meeting was starting.

questions.explanation: В косвенных вопросах не используется инверсия, порядок слов соответствует утверждению.
